creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
mm          2011-10-11 19:34:04 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics/ImageMagick Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    graphics/ImageMagick/files patch-magick-string.c 
  Log:
  - Update to 6.7.3-0
  - Add upstream patch to fix bundled tests [1]
  - Add LCMS2 support (enabled by default)
  - Add WEBP support (enabled by default)
  - Enable WMF support by default
  - Disable the IMAGEMAGICK_TESTS option by default
  - Run tests if building package
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  
  PR:             ports/161487 [1]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.332     +56 -28    ports/graphics/ImageMagick/Makefile
  1.159     +2 -2      ports/graphics/ImageMagick/distinfo
